response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and versatility across multiple domains, this role requires a specialist in embedded networking security with native-level Japanese proficiency. The candidate shows no Japanese language skills, no expertise in security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption protocols), no networking specialization (SNMP, NETCONF, Ansible), and no embedded firmware focus. His career is anchored in web and full-stack development, not embedded systems or network security.
strengths: 15+ years of software development experience with demonstrated expertise in software craftsmanship, TDD, and cross-functional collaboration across teams
Proven ability to work across multiple programming languages including C/C++, with exposure to low-level systems work at National Instruments and high-performance backend services at Dunnhumby
Strong technical communication and thought leadership, evidenced by workshops, open-source contributions, and teaching initiatives
concerns: No mention of Japanese language proficiency; the role requires native-level fluency as a hard requirement
Career trajectory is entirely web and backend development with zero demonstrated expertise in embedded networking security, security protocols, or network switch technologies

Limited and dated C/C++ experience (last significant role 10+ years ago); primary languages are TypeScript/Node.js with no evidence of Linux kernel investigation or modification capability required for the role

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking security specialization or background
Strong general software engineering and craftsmanship principles
